theorem:  merge_permut
sample:   0
attempt:  fix_2

[proof]
induction xs generalizing ys with
| nil =>
  simp [merge, Permut]
| cons x xs IH =>
  induction ys with
  | nil =>
    simp [merge, Permut]
  | cons y ys IHys =>
    by_cases h : x < y
    · simp [merge, h, Permut]
      intro t
      simp [count1]
      exact IH (y :: ys) t
    · intro t
      have hy : Permut ([y] : List T) [y] := by
        intro t'
        simp [Permut, count1]
      have hcount :=
        lemma_hint_33 ([y] : List T) (merge (x :: xs) ys) [y] ((x :: xs) ++ ys) hy (IHys) t
      simpa [merge, h, count1, List.cons_append, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc] using hcount

[lean error]
location:
              lemma_hint_33 ([y] : List T) (merge (x :: xs) ys) [y] ((x :: xs) ++ ys) hy (IHys) t
            simpa [merge, h, count1, List.cons_append, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc] using hcount
           ^
error: Type mismatch: After simplification, term
  hcount
 has type
  (count1 (merge (x :: xs) ys) t + if y = t then 1 else 0) =
    count1 (xs ++ ys) t + ((if x = t then 1 else 0) + if y = t then 1 else 0)
but is expected to have type
  (count1 (merge (x :: xs) ys) t + if y = t then 1 else 0) = count1 (xs ++ y :: ys) t + if x = t then 1 else 0

location:
              intro t'
              simp [Permut, count1]
                   ^
            have hcount :=
error: This simp argument is unused:
  Permut
Hint: Omit it from the simp argument list.
  simp [P̵e̵r̵m̵u̵t̵,̵ ̵count1]
Note: This linter can be disabled with `set_option linter.unusedSimpArgs false`
